lesson: Docker and docs were added as reproducibility/open-source scaffolding, but Docker daemon was not reachable locally.
evidence: python ops/run_tests.py passed 139 tests; docker API pipe was unavailable
reuse_when: packaging, public GitHub release, reproducibility review

lesson: NOAA MUR SST API times out on annual requests; chunk satellite fetches by quarter.
reuse_when: Any NOAA/MUR/SST satellite fetch or remote data ingestion task.

lesson: Training target scaling must match evaluator un-scaling; global-average training scaling mismatched with local context-window evaluation caused worse MAPE.
evidence: Prior fix reportedly dropped MAPE from 1.29% to 0.21%.
reuse_when: Any target normalization, denormalization, evaluator, latent forecasting, or training-loop change.

lesson: Ocean sensors can flatline; near-zero variance can make normalized targets explode, so clip normalized targets such as [-20, 20].
evidence: Hard-learned project lesson recorded in science mission.
reuse_when: Any normalization, target transform, loss debugging, or sensor-quality work.

lesson: Safety monitors should use torch.cuda.memory_allocated(), not memory_reserved(), because PyTorch caches reserved memory aggressively.
evidence: Hard-learned VRAM monitor lesson recorded in science mission.
reuse_when: Any CUDA safety monitor, watchdog, run_safe, or training watchdog change.

lesson: An RTX 5090 can starve behind single-threaded Pandas I/O; prefer vectorized scans, Polars streaming, pin_memory, and CUDA prefetching for heavy pipelines.
evidence: Hard-learned I/O starvation lesson recorded in science mission.
reuse_when: Any dataloader, Parquet scan, training throughput, or GPU utilization work.

lesson: The bottleneck is coordination, not capability; use Command Center as a cockpit for observe, Brain search, preflight, narrow agent assignment, safe run, and reflection.
evidence: AI engineer sidecar reviewed AGENTS.md, Brain files, command center, telemetry, sentinel, traffic controller, run_safe, and recent logs.
reuse_when: Starting the day, launching agents, handing off work, or deciding whether to add another feature/panel/framework.

lesson: Use a tracked stack registry plus live Stack Watch state to ensure the dashboard covers every required layer; do not rely on a static PDF as the source of truth.
evidence: ARCHITECTURE_VIZ.pdf exists, but local PDF parsers are unavailable; Stack Watch /api/state exposes live sources, bronze, silver, training, evaluation, gold, claims, GPU, queue, artifacts, and promotion state.
reuse_when: Auditing dashboard completeness, adding a stack panel, or deciding whether a new visualization is bloat.

lesson: In-flight work should be shown by stack layer so the AI Director can see whether active work is in ingestion, training, evaluation, claims, agents, traffic, sentinel, or telemetry.
evidence: Command Center now maps Stack Watch processes, active locks, and sentinel state into an in-flight-by-layer payload.
reuse_when: Auditing active work, assigning agents, or deciding whether a new task would collide with current stack activity.

lesson: The project is Monterey Bay AI Lab. MBAL may be mentioned factually as a data source/provider or legacy compatibility token, but agents must not imply MBAL owns, names, drives, or directs the lab.
evidence: User clarified that MBAL data-source references are fine, but the project name and driver are Monterey Bay AI Lab, not MBAL.
reuse_when: Writing dashboards, GitHub metadata, package metadata, docs, generated reports, agent summaries, or project charters.

lesson: Adding physical wave proxies (Hs, Tp, Dm) via nearest-buoy spatial join provides a significant lift over station-memory baselines.

evidence: Bridged Qwen's CDIP fetcher to the benchmark; confirmed +11% AP lift.
lesson: Directing Qwen to close the identity/join gap before logging 'Complete'. speculative work must be grounded in quantitative lift to pass the Lead Monitor.

evidence: Monterey buoy (46042) is currently the only source; SF/SD gaps identified.
lesson: Data depth (40 years) is worthless without data breadth (station coverage) for statewide models. Blocking Qwen's modeling work until buoy coverage matches beach distribution.
